summary: Iteration 1 — First full validation of Shippzu food delivery module. Backend: 54/54 pytest tests passed (100%) covering health, auth (register/login/refresh/me/google/change-password/forgot-reset), food/home aggregated feed, categories (>=10), restaurants list+filters+search+sort, restaurant detail with menu grouping, foods list, coupons list + apply (WELCOME50/SHIPPZU100/SAVE20/FEAST30 + min-order + invalid), addresses CRUD + default exclusivity, order quote math, COD order placement, Razorpay stub (order_stub_* id), verify-payment stub → paid, orders list sorted desc, advance flow placed→accepted→preparing→picked_up→on_the_way→delivered, cancel constraints, notifications list/read/mark-all-read, favourites toggle (restaurant+food) and hydrated list, reviews add + rating validation, and role protection (401 for protected endpoints). Frontend (mobile 390x844): splash → onboarding (Skip) → login → signup submit → home renders categories, 4 coupons, 8 featured + 23 nearby restaurants → restaurant detail loads with menu → ADD food to cart works → cart page shows items + Bill details → coupon WELCOME50 applied (discount ₹50) → checkout page renders payment methods (COD default + Razorpay DEMO banner). No deprecated Expo packages (expo-av/barcode-scanner/background-fetch) found in app source. All interactive elements have testID. Backend fully production-ready for Phase 1. Frontend E2E happy path verified up to checkout.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate testID 'add-address-btn' — one in empty-state (Pressable inside empty view around line 61) and one in sticky footer. Playwright resolves 2 elements and the first (empty-state) may be clipped when list is empty, causing 'Element is not visible' errors. Give each a unique testID e.g. 'add-address-btn-empty' and 'add-address-btn-footer'.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' — appears on nearly every screen (RN Web deprecation). Migrate elevation/shadow* → boxShadow.
props.pointerEvents is deprecated on web — use style.pointerEvents.
useNativeDriver warning on web preview (harmless, only matters on native).

action_items: (Low) Split duplicate testID 'add-address-btn' on /addresses screen into two distinct IDs.
(Low) Replace deprecated 'shadow*' style props with 'boxShadow' across components to silence RN Web warnings.
(Info) All auto-seeded content (12 restaurants, 10 categories, 4 coupons, ~30 foods) is present and rendering.
(Info) Razorpay + Google Social Login + FCM continue as intentional STUB MODE per Phase 1 spec — no action needed unless production keys are added.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend uses uuid-based `id` field and consistently excludes MongoDB `_id` via projections — good.
JWT auth + refresh flow implemented cleanly. Refresh endpoint correctly checks payload['type']=='refresh'.
Order pricing math verified: grand_total == subtotal + delivery + platform + packaging + taxes - discount (within 2p rounding).
Coupon apply handles both 'flat' and percentage discounts with max_discount cap.
Address 'is_default' exclusivity enforced via update_many({user_id}) before insert/update — correct.
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly. All interactive elements have testID (100+ found).
No hardcoded URLs, no deprecated Expo packages (expo-av / expo-barcode-scanner / expo-background-fetch) in app source.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (checkout-to-order-placement UI path blocked only by duplicate testID for add-address; underlying API flow verified separately by backend tests)

seed_data_creation: Auto-seed by backend on boot (12 restaurants, 10 categories, 4 coupons, ~30 foods) confirmed present. Test users created dynamically per pytest run (ui.test+<uuid>@shippzu.com and test.customer+<uuid>@shippzu.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has full pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Duplicate testID on addresses page is the only frontend blocker for Playwright automation of the final address→place-order step; API-level order placement is fully green. Google login is stub — frontend does NOT invoke real Google SSO. Razorpay is stub — verify-payment always returns verified:true when order id starts with order_stub_.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no critical bugs. Duplicate testID on addresses screen is a testability issue only; users are not affected. Recommendation: give unique testIDs to inner empty-state CTA vs sticky footer CTA.
